description_long: This is a large, red and white semi-truck with a prominent rectangular trailer attached to a classic American-style cab. The cab is painted bright red with chrome accents, visible exhaust stacks, and a detailed front grille. The trailer is white with a blue and red star emblem and the words 'USA TRUCK' boldly displayed on the side. The truck features six wheels on the trailer and four on the cab, with black tires and silver rims. The windows of the cab are dark, and the trailer appears to be a closed box type, suitable for transporting goods. The overall design is utilitarian yet iconic, reflecting a typical long-haul freight vehicle seen on highways and in urban logistics.
description: A red and white American-style semi-truck with a box trailer, chrome accents, and 'USA TRUCK' branding on the side.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the plain white back of the trailer and the dual rear wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the 'USA TRUCK' logo, star emblem, and the full length of the trailer and cab.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the red cab, chrome grille, and the truck's headlights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same 'USA TRUCK' branding and clear visibility of the cab and trailer connection.
